reviews.comment:
Los baños limpios y el personal muy amable. Parada obligada en un viaje largo a CABA.
Había Gasoil cuando pasamos.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were clean and the staff very friendly. A must-stop on a long trip to Buenos Aires. They had diesel when we passed by.
